/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/window.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/file.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/shader.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/quad.c.o CMakeFiles/SeaChess.dir/src/box.c.o -o SeaChess  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/braden/Documents/Programming/C/SeaChess/build/external/SDL -Wl,-rpath,/Users/braden/Documents/Programming/C/SeaChess/build/external/cglm libglad.a external/SDL/libSDL3.0.dylib external/cglm/libcglm.0.9.6.dylib external/freetype/libfreetype.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libbz2.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/brotli/1.2.0/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib
